Introduction
    Tugumi is a movie starring Riho Makise, Tomoko Nakajima, and Yasuyo Shirashima. Tugumi, who lives in a small seaside town, has been in delicate health from birth. Her parents spoiled her and she is rough and selfish. However, a few...
